title: As Iran Retaliates, U.S. Closes Embassies in Saudi Arabia and Kuwait
author: Yan Zhuang
fullText: The State Department also ordered nonessential staff in the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Bahrain, Jordan and Iraq to to leave amid further retaliation from Iran.
summary: The State Department also ordered nonessential staff in the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Bahrain, Jordan and Iraq to to leave amid further retaliation from Iran.
